titleStmt.title: SII 5.669: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 669. (A.R. No. 108 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟutta go varājarājakecarivanma ṟkku
yāṇṭu pati(n)nonṟāvatu kunṟakūṟṟattu brahma teyam ciṟupaḻuvūr cāvanti
bha ṭṭan centan Ātittanen viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilam vilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr
tiruvālantuṟai caṇṭecurarkku nān viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr ce
ṅkuḷattut tūmpil kiḻpuṟa vākkālkarai nān viṟṟa nilattukkuk kiḻpārk kel
lai paṭṭukkaḷukke pona vākkālukku meṟkku tenpārk kellai tenceri tāṉa
pperumakkaḷ nilattu vaṭakkum mīpāṟ kellai nārāyaṇan pacuvati nilattukkum
cāvanti śrīkaṇṭan māṟan nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai vaṭaceri tan peru
makkaḷ nilattukku teṟkkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Araimāvum mikitik kuṟaimai
Uḷppaṭak kuṭuttuk koṇṭa vilaipporuḷ tīppokkuc cemapon kaḻa
ñcu Ikkaḻañcu ponnum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaiccela vaṟakkoṇṭu Innilam
Āvaṇañceytu viṟṟuk kuṭutten tiruvālantuṟai caṇḍeśvara ṟkku bha ṭṭan centa
Ātittanen Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvaṇamum Ituve poruḷmāv
vaṟutip poruḷc cilavolai yāvataākavum Itu vallatu poruḷ māvaṟatip poruḷ
ccilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭavan ṉallātānākavum Ipparicu Oṭṭi vilaikkaṟaviṟṟu
vilaiyāvaṇañ ceyten tiruvālattuṟai śaṇḍeśvarar kku bha ṭṭan centan Ātittya
nen panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.669 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
